allow: Bash(lsof -nP -iTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN -t 2>/dev/null && echo "3000 occupied" || echo "3000 free"; echo "---chrome---"; ls "/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" 2>/dev/null && echo "chrome present" || echo "no chrome")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=ledgerly_dev_password psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U ledgerly -d ledgerly -t -c 'SELECT email, name FROM "User" LIMIT 5;')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3002/api/auth/signup -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"検証ユーザー","email":"verify-test@example.com","password":"verifypass123"}' -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3002/api/auth/signup -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"検証ユーザー","email":"verify-test@example.com","password":"VerifyPass123"}' -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3002/api/auth/signup -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"検証ユーザー","email":"verify-test@example.com","password":"VerifyPass123!"}' -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n')
